title: Senior Financial Analyst - Paytm Money - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Paytm Money - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
